name: Safe synthetic playbook: Endpoint ransomware-like behavior telemetry
description: Describes heuristic signals commonly associated with destructive malware (entropy, mass file operations) on an isolated lab VM. No ransomware binary, no encryption keys, no recovery circumvention.

simulated_timeline.synthetic_narrative: EDR stub raises entropy heuristic on lab endpoint lab-desktop-iris-09.
Synthetic counters show rapid file churn in user profile tree (fixture path labels only).
Network isolation playbook arm suggested in simulation namespace.

events_emitted.headline: EDR heuristic alert
events_emitted.synthetic_detail: Lab-only heuristic bundle; excludes live malware hashes.

events_emitted.headline: Incident-scale finding created
events_emitted.synthetic_detail: Aligns endpoint with backup and IR runbook pointers (metadata).

expected_agents_triggered.triggered_reason_synthetic: Destructive-pattern alert requires IR orchestration lane.
Backup and recovery control posture reviewed against signal.

expected_remediation.summary: Simulated host isolation, backup integrity check artifact, forensic collection request (no hostile disk imaging instructions).

expected_autonomous_remediation.synthetic_action: Trigger lab network segmentation flag for affected host group.

expected_human_approval_gates.synthetic_rationale: Isolation impacts user productivity and clinical/business uptime.
Selecting restore timeframe needs data owner confirmation.

expected_final_report.title: Ransomware behavior signal — synthetic playbook outcome
expected_final_report.synthetic_executive_summary: Heuristic bundle suggested destructive malware activity on a lab host; playbook stops at containment and backup validation planning.
